{{CargoRelic
|name=Tengu Feather Fan
|class_id=22452
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAITH
|birthday=03-13
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.03%)
|description=On Mar 13, 634 AD, a Tengu was spotted soaring through the sky and caught the attention of humans.<br>The Tengu is a legendary creature from Japanese folklore, depicted as having huge wings, a red face, and a long nose. It carries a fan that possesses incredible magical powers beyond human imagination. This fan can summon powerful storms and even temporarily influence the climate of its surroundings.
|fame=23
|art=33
|fth=47
|civ=21
|tech=30
|ss1=Per 5 Epic Protodex Stars, Snail DEF +3<br>Epic Protodex Stars: 100/100
|ss2=Per 5 Epic Protodex Stars, Snail DEF +6<br>Epic Protodex Stars: 100/100
|ss3=Per 5 Epic Protodex Stars, Snail DEF +9<br>Epic Protodex Stars: 100/100
|ss4=Per 5 Epic Protodex Stars, Snail DEF +15<br>Epic Protodex Stars: 100/100
|ss7=Per 5 Epic Protodex Stars, Snail DEF +15<br>Epic Protodex Stars: 100/100<br>Snail DEF +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Yamato skill I.png|50px]]Place in Yamato Museum: In Yamato, Snail ATK +20
}}
